summary: Loyalty enhancement (Top Customers ranking widget + public loyalty card with QR + email-card flow) tested end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed (top-customers ranking & tabs coherence, public-card valid/invalid token + 404, send-card-email validation). Frontend: Public route /loyalty-card/:customerId works without login (verified by clearing localStorage), invalid token shows 'Tarjeta no disponible' WITHOUT redirect, Dashboard widget shows 3 tabs (30/90/Siempre) updating summary (Ganados/Canjeados/Gastado) and rows, Customers page card dialog renders QR + URL + 3 buttons with correct disabled state for clients without email.
critical_code_review_comments: OK: HMAC token uses hmac.compare_digest preventing timing attacks; deterministic 16-char hex from JWT_SECRET.
OK: /loyalty-card/:customerId route is correctly OUTSIDE ProtectedRoute (App.js line 51) — verified accessible with cleared localStorage.
OK: send-card-email validates customer existence (404) and email presence (400) before invoking Resend — prevents wasted API calls.
MINOR: send-card-email endpoint imports `resend` inside the function — fine for lazy load but consider top-level import for consistency.
MINOR: top-customers aggregation joins customers by id; deleted customers show as 'Cliente eliminado' (already handled gracefully).
MINOR: Public card endpoint exposes phone number — consider masking or removing in public response if PII privacy required.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testids present, widget + dialog + public route verified)

test_credentials: Admin PIN: 11338585. AAA DOMINICANA token: 4a60953346b76734 (deterministic from JWT_SECRET).
seed_data_creation: Created/deleted ephemeral customer 'TEST_NoEmail Loyalty' inside test for 400-on-no-email assertion (cleaned up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_loyalty_top_and_card.py (9 tests). Public loyalty-card route requires HMAC token derived as hmac_sha256(JWT_SECRET, 'loyalty-card:'+customer_id)[:16]. Helper to compute token in test file for any cid. PaymentScreen redeem-points regression NOT re-tested (no open bill seeded + protected code policy); existing /api/customers/{cid}/redeem-points endpoint verified untouched in routers/customers.py lines 122-131. Visit data: AAA DOMINICANA shows last 3 visits (T-1194 +182/-100, T-1186 +64, T-1182 +76).
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All review-request acceptance criteria satisfied.
